name: fit4110_lab03_access_gate_core_contract_tests
description: FIT4110 Lab 03 - Access Gate, Core Business, Analytics contract testing with Postman, Prism, Newman and CI

scripts.lint:contract: spectral lint contracts/access-gate-core.openapi.yaml contracts/analytics.openapi.yaml --format stylish --output reports/contract-lint-report.txt && node -e "require('fs').appendFileSync('reports/contract-lint-report.txt', 'Spectral lint passed for contracts/access-gate-core.openapi.yaml and contracts/analytics.openapi.yaml\n')"
